items.q: Do you offer temporary staffing solutions for health and care in Hammersmith and Fulham?
items.a: Yes. Our temporary care staffing agency provides healthcare assistants, support workers, and live-in carers for urgent, short-term, and ongoing needs.

items.q: Can you supply night-shift staff for care homes?
items.a: Absolutely. We have agency care workers available for planned or emergency night cover.

items.q: Do you work with private households as well as facilities?
items.a: Yes. As an agency for care workers, we support both private clients and organisations.

items.q: Are your staff trained to meet CQC requirements?
items.a: Yes. All staff are trained to CQC standards and follow industry best practices.

items.q: Can you cover multiple sites across West London?
items.a: Yes. Our healthcare assistant recruitment agency can support clients with facilities in neighbouring boroughs.

fields.body: Care Staffing Agency in Hammersmith and Fulham Care Staffing Agency in Hammersmith and Fulham – Vigil Care Staffing provides reliable, CQC-compliant professionals across the borough, including healthcare assistants, support workers, and emergency care staff. Your Local Partner for Professional Care & Support Staffing in West London. Get a Quote Vigil Care Staffing provides urgent and ongoing staffing solutions for care homes, supported living services, NHS facilities, and private households across this vibrant borough.
We specialise in connecting you with the right people at the right time — from healthcare assistants to live-in carers — so your service can maintain the highest standards of care.

We: Provide healthcare assistant staffing, support workers, live-in carers, night-shift staff, and emergency cover teams. Maintain strict compliance with CQC regulations and Skills for Care guidance. Deliver temporary healthcare staffing for urgent, short-term, and planned assignments. Supply only DBS-checked, trained, and experienced agency care workers.

Operate a 24/7 response line to meet staffing needs at any hour. Our goal is to be your long-term staffing partner, helping you focus on care delivery while we handle your workforce needs. Choosing us as your healthcare recruitment agency in Hammersmith & Fulham brings tangible benefits: When you choose us as your care staffing agency in Kensington and Chelsea , you gain access to a proactive, flexible, and highly skilled workforce. Key benefits include: 1 Rapid response times same-day placements for urgent requirements.

2 Local knowledge familiarity with the borough’s services and communities. 3 Continuity of Care regular rotations of the same staff to build rapport with service users. 4 Specialist Matching pairing your vacancy with the most suitable agency care worker or healthcare assistant. 5 Transparent processes clear communication from booking to completion.

6 Preventative workforce planning helping you prepare for predictable seasonal demands. We take a proactive approach to staffing, ensuring you have access to temporary staffing solutions for health and care exactly when you need them. Borough-Level Coverage & Neighbourhoods Served Our temporary care staffing agency serves all areas within Hammersmith and Fulham, including: Hammersmith Fulham Parsons Green West Kensington Brook Green Sands End Shepherd’s Bush (south) White City (part) Barons Court Old Oak Common We also offer cross-borough cover for clients with facilities in Kensington & Chelsea , Wandsworth , and Ealing . This means you can rely on one staffing partner to maintain consistent service quality across multiple locations.

Facilities We Serve in Hammersmith & Fulham We provide staffing for: Care homes (residential and nursing) Private households requiring live-in or respite care Supported living schemes Day centres and respite care services Rehabilitation and step-down units NHS clinics and community services Our flexibility makes us a preferred HCA agency for both small-scale providers and multi-site care groups. Our Vetting & Compliance Process We ensure every agency healthcare assistant and support worker we place meets strict compliance requirements: Enhanced DBS check to meet safeguarding standards. Full ID verification and reference checks. Mandatory training in infection prevention, manual handling, safeguarding adults, and basic life support.

Specialist courses such as dementia care, autism awareness, and palliative care. Onboarding in line with our staff vetting process and onboarding standards. Our compliance framework ensures that staff are not only qualified but also aligned with your service’s values and operational standards. Case Study – Emergency HCA Deployment in Fulham Client: Residential care home in Fulham Challenge A sudden outbreak of seasonal illness left several regular staff unable to work, creating a staffing crisis.

Solution Within four hours, our temporary healthcare staffing team deployed two experienced HCAs, both trained in infection prevention and elderly care. Outcome Continuity of care was maintained, and the care home manager praised our ability to act swiftly and supply skilled staff who integrated seamlessly into the existing team. “Vigil Care Staffing responded faster than we imagined possible. The healthcare assistants they sent were professional, proactive, and quickly became part of our care team.
, Care Home Manager, Fulham (FAQs) Frequently Asked Question (FAQs) Do you offer temporary staffing solutions for health and care in Hammersmith and Fulham?
